_comment: Source-of-truth manifest. filament.py slices each STL once and writes ../src/lib/data/parts.generated.json + thumbnails + STL copies. Per part: id, name, category, description (short, shown in app), internal_notes (extended, agent-only, NOT emitted to the app), version, date_added, stl, quantity (per ONE instance of its category), color, optional. color is one of {"role":"<roleid>"} (user-picked), {"fixed":"<lego-id>"}, {"split":[{"color":"<lego-id>","qty":N},...]} (sums to quantity), or {"any":true}. Machine = 1 of each non-scaling category + N of each scaling category. See ../notes/TERMINOLOGY.md.

parts.name: Stator
parts.internal_notes: One per C-channel area. 1 gray, 3 black. Required. ~240mm disc (bed-max).

parts.name: Rotor (faceted)
parts.internal_notes: 2 white, 1 gray. Required.

parts.name: C-channel leg
parts.internal_notes: 9 total. Feeder/C-channel color.

parts.name: Output gear (130T)
parts.description: Output gear, 130 teeth. One per C-channel (4 total).
parts.internal_notes: 1 per C-channel => 4 total. Feeder color.

parts.name: NEMA bracket
parts.description: NEMA motor bracket. One per C-channel (4 total).
parts.internal_notes: 1 per C-channel => 4 total. File: 'Nema Bracket Bulk Section'; meaning of 'bulk section' unknown. Spencer believes all NEMA brackets are the same across C-channels. Feeder color.

parts.name: Light post cap
parts.internal_notes: 2 of the C-channels (2 and 3) have these. White. NOT the big classification dome.

parts.name: Bulk cap
parts.description: Bulk cap. Sits on top of the first C-channel.
parts.internal_notes: 1 bulk cap, on top of the first C-channel. Color not critical; default black (follows feeder color). File: 'Bulk Cap B'. Distinct from the bulk bucket (separate bed-max optional part, not yet provided).

parts.name: Classification dome
parts.internal_notes: Big dome, almost the entire print bed. White (lighting/diffusion). Was previously mislabeled 'light cap'. QUANTITY ASSUMED 1 - confirm.

parts.name: Interface bracket
parts.description: Interface bracket. Pairs with the spacer; 6 on the interface.
parts.internal_notes: 6 bracket+spacer pairs on the interface. Frame color. File: 000_interface_layer_assembly - top_bracket.

parts.name: Interface spacer
parts.description: Interface spacer. Pairs with the bracket; 6 on the interface.
parts.internal_notes: 6 on the interface. Frame color. File: 000_interface_layer_assembly - bottom_spacer.

parts.name: Chute core
parts.internal_notes: 1 per machine. Its own color selector (chute core).

parts.name: Funnel
parts.description: Funnel that attaches to the chute core. 1 per layer.
parts.internal_notes: 1 per layer. Own color selector (funnels). Spencer's are gray. File: funnel_third.

parts.name: Bin (third size)
parts.internal_notes: 18 PER LAYER (not per machine). Optional - a layer is a layer of bins; if you don't print bins you don't need retainers either. Bins are typically various colors -> 'any'.

parts.name: Bin retainer (left)
parts.internal_notes: Optional. QUANTITY UNCONFIRMED (assumed 1/layer).

parts.name: Bin retainer (right)
parts.internal_notes: Optional. QUANTITY UNCONFIRMED (assumed 1/layer).

parts.name: Frame crossbeam
parts.description: Distribution frame crossbeam. One between each of the 6 frame sections.
parts.internal_notes: 6 per frame (per layer). Frame color. File: combined_internal_bracket.

parts.name: Frame 90° bracket
parts.description: Distribution frame 90° bracket. Two per frame section.
parts.internal_notes: 12 per frame (per layer). Frame color. File: inner_90_bracket.

parts.name: Lazy Susan — chute mount
parts.description: Bottom lazy Susan adapter that connects to the chute. White.
parts.internal_notes: The adapter/connector that mounts to the chute. White. The rest of the lazy Susan is frame color.

parts.name: Lazy Susan — bottom static
parts.internal_notes: Frame color. QUANTITY ASSUMED 1.

parts.name: Lazy Susan — extrusion mount
parts.description: Bottom lazy Susan mount to the external extrusion.
parts.internal_notes: Frame color. QUANTITY ASSUMED 1.

parts.name: Lazy Susan — hold in place
parts.internal_notes: Optional (file: 'optional hold in place'). Frame color. QUANTITY ASSUMED 1.

parts.name: Lazy Susan — washer
parts.internal_notes: Frame color. QUANTITY UNCONFIRMED (assumed 1; may be several).

parts.name: External bracket — side
parts.description: Part of the external distribution-frame bracket (3-part assembly).
parts.internal_notes: External distribution-frame bracket assembly member. 6 per distribution frame (per layer); interface qty ASSUMED 6 (Spencer said 'one set per interface' - confirm). Frame color.

parts.name: External bracket — bottom vertical
parts.description: Part of the external distribution-frame bracket (3-part assembly).
parts.internal_notes: External distribution-frame bracket assembly member. 6 per distribution frame (per layer); interface qty ASSUMED 6 (Spencer said 'one set per interface' - confirm). Frame color.

parts.name: External bracket — cover
parts.description: Part of the external distribution-frame bracket (3-part assembly).
parts.internal_notes: External distribution-frame bracket assembly member. 6 per distribution frame (per layer); interface qty ASSUMED 6 (Spencer said 'one set per interface' - confirm). Frame color.

parts.name: Interface rib
parts.internal_notes: 5 per interface. Frame color.

parts.name: Interface rib (switch gap)
parts.description: Interface rib with the opening for the limit switch. 1 needed.
parts.internal_notes: 1 per interface. The rib variant with the limit-switch gap. Frame color.

parts.name: Cable clamp (inner)
parts.description: Inner half of the ribbon cable clamp. White.
parts.internal_notes: 1 per interface. White. Pairs with the outer clamp (cable-clamp assembly).

parts.name: Cable clamp (outer)
parts.description: Outer half of the ribbon cable clamp. White.
parts.internal_notes: 1 per interface. White. Pairs with the inner clamp (cable-clamp assembly).

parts.name: Interface spur gear (2M 25T)
parts.internal_notes: 1 per interface. Frame color.

parts.name: Interface idler gear (2M 25T)
parts.internal_notes: 1 per interface. Frame color.

parts.name: Interface NEMA 23 bracket
parts.description: NEMA 23 motor bracket on the interface. 1 needed.
parts.internal_notes: 1 per interface. Frame color.

parts.name: Cable cage bracket
parts.internal_notes: 5 regular per interface; plus 1 of the cable-mount variant. Frame color.

parts.name: Cable cage bracket (cable mount)
parts.description: Cable cage bracket with the cable mount. 1 needed.
parts.internal_notes: 1 per interface; the cage bracket variant with a cable mount. Frame color.

parts.name: Interface big spacer
parts.internal_notes: 1 per interface. Frame color. Distinct from interface-spacer.

parts.name: Interface upper fixed section
parts.internal_notes: 1 per interface. Frame color.

parts.name: Classification cap (small)
parts.description: Smaller classification cap (not the big dome). White.
parts.internal_notes: From 01_c_channel zip 'Classification Cap.stl' (820KB; the big dome is 'Classification Cap (2)'). White. Qty ASSUMED 1.

parts.name: Rotor (finned)
parts.description: Finned rotor on the classification chamber. White. 1 needed.
parts.internal_notes: File '01_c_channel - Rotor - with fins.stl'. White. 1x. On the classification chamber.

parts.name: Idler gear (24T)
parts.description: C-channel idler gear, 24 teeth. One per C-channel (4 total).
parts.internal_notes: Idler gear (24 teeth). 1 per C-channel => 4. Feeder color.

parts.name: Input gear (12T, screw)
parts.description: C-channel input/drive gear (12T) with vertical screw hole. One per C-channel (4 total).
parts.internal_notes: File 'Spur gear (12 teeth) - vertical screw' - the input/drive gear variant WITH the screw hole. 1 per C-channel => 4. Feeder color.

parts.name: Output guide
parts.internal_notes: Plain 'Output Guide.stl'. 2 total. Black (feeder color default).

parts.name: Funnel bracket (left)
parts.description: Funnel bracket, left. 2 funnel brackets total.
parts.internal_notes: Chute-core assembly part. COLOR UNSPECIFIED by Spencer - defaulted to frame (black); confirm.

parts.name: Funnel bracket (right)
parts.description: Funnel bracket, right. 2 funnel brackets total.
parts.internal_notes: Chute-core assembly part. COLOR UNSPECIFIED by Spencer - defaulted to frame (black); confirm.

parts.name: Chute door
parts.internal_notes: Chute-core assembly part. COLOR UNSPECIFIED by Spencer - defaulted to frame (black); confirm.

parts.internal_notes: Chute-core assembly part. COLOR UNSPECIFIED by Spencer - defaulted to frame (black); confirm.

parts.name: Bearing holder (right)
parts.internal_notes: Chute-core assembly part. COLOR UNSPECIFIED by Spencer - defaulted to frame (black); confirm.

parts.name: Bearing race (between holders)
parts.description: Piece between the bearing holders (best name-match: bearing_race). CONFIRM.
parts.internal_notes: Guessed as the 'piece between the bearing holders' (file bearing_race). Alt candidate: left_axle. COLOR UNSPECIFIED - defaulted frame.

parts.name: Servo adapter — servo side
parts.internal_notes: Chute-core assembly part. COLOR UNSPECIFIED by Spencer - defaulted to frame (black); confirm.

parts.name: Servo adapter — flap side
parts.internal_notes: Chute-core assembly part. COLOR UNSPECIFIED by Spencer - defaulted to frame (black); confirm.

parts.internal_notes: Chute-core assembly part. COLOR UNSPECIFIED by Spencer - defaulted to frame (black); confirm.

parts.name: Servo bracket — side arm
parts.internal_notes: Chute-core assembly part. COLOR UNSPECIFIED by Spencer - defaulted to frame (black); confirm.

parts.name: Servo bracket — cover
parts.internal_notes: Chute-core assembly part. COLOR UNSPECIFIED by Spencer - defaulted to frame (black); confirm.

parts.name: Servo bracket — housing
parts.internal_notes: Chute-core assembly part. COLOR UNSPECIFIED by Spencer - defaulted to frame (black); confirm.

assemblies.name: External distribution-frame bracket
assemblies.description: Three parts that bolt together into one external bracket. 6 per distribution frame (per layer), plus a set per interface.

assemblies.name: Cable clamp
assemblies.description: Inner + outer ribbon cable clamp; the two halves go together. White.

assemblies.name: Classification chamber
assemblies.description: The classification chamber: dome, cap, and finned rotor (lighting parts white).

assemblies.name: Chute bearing assembly
assemblies.description: Left + right bearing holders and the race between them.

assemblies.name: Servo adapter (MG995)
assemblies.description: MG995 servo adapter: servo side + flap side.

assemblies.name: Servo bracket (MG995)
assemblies.description: MG995 servo bracket: lower arm, side arm, cover, housing.
